user_query:
I'm an established mixed media artist with a large personal library of vintage books. I need help prioritizing and optimizing several site pages for search, using the data and page content I've provided locally.

Inputs:
- input/pages.csv
- input/content/*.md

What I need:
1) Rank all pages and export a prioritized list:
- Sort all rows from input/pages.csv by:
  a) traffic_30d descending,
  b) then bounce_rate descending,
  c) then last_updated ascending (older first).
- Save the full ranked table to output/priority_ranked.csv with columns: slug, title, category, traffic_30d, bounce_rate, last_updated, rank_position (1-based).

2) Optimize the top 5 pages by rank:
- For each of the top 5 slugs, propose a new SEO title and meta description that:
  - Includes the page's primary_keyword (from input/pages.csv) in both the title and meta description.
  - Title length ≤ 60 characters.
  - Meta description length between 120 and 155 characters inclusive.
- Edit the corresponding markdown file from input/content/<slug>.md as follows:
  - Update the first line H1 to the new title.
  - Rewrite only the first paragraph to introduce the page naturally and include the primary_keyword exactly once within the first 120 words.
  - Keep the rest of the document unchanged.
  - Preserve any existing internal links of the form [text](/slug) in the first paragraph; do not remove or alter their link targets.
- Save the modified file to output/optimized_content/<slug>.md (same filename, new folder).
- Append a row to output/metadata_updates.csv with columns: slug, old_title, new_title, old_meta_description, new_meta_description, title_length, meta_length.

3) Compose a concise status report at output/seo_update_report.md that includes:
- Overview: a short summary of the goals and the sorting rule used.
- Ranked Pages: a list of the top 5 with their traffic_30d, bounce_rate, and last_updated.
- Changes Summary: for each optimized page, bullets of what changed (title, first paragraph keyword inclusion, meta description) and a brief rationale tied to the metrics.
- Next Steps: the next 3 pages by rank you would tackle next.

Key constraints:
- Do not change slugs.
- Do not remove or alter any internal link targets already present in the first paragraph.
- Use each primary_keyword exactly once in the first paragraph and ensure it appears within the first 120 words.
- Ensure all outputs are created under the output/ directory in the paths specified above. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
